requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (EAEU TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（EAEU TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（EAEU TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Kazakhstan market are regulated under the EAEU framework as a member of the Eurasian Economic Union. Electrical safety of low-voltage equipment is governed by Technical Regulation of the Customs Union TR CU 004/2011 （On the safety of low-voltage equipment）, covering equipment rated 50–1000 V AC. The applicable harmonised safety standard for refrigerators is GOST IEC 60335-2-24 （Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers）, read together with the general standard GOST IEC 60335-1. The 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal grid in Kazakhstan matches China's 220/380 V 50 Hz, so no nominal voltage or frequency re-engineering is required. Conformity is demonstrated by the EAC mark, issued through certification or declaration of conformity by an EAEU-accredited certification body; the conformity document is then entered in the unified EAEU register. Key technical requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, earthing continuity, and product markings in Russian and Kazakh.
summary.zh: 投放哈萨克斯坦市场的家用制冷器具作为欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员国受EAEU框架管控。低压设备的电气安全由海关联盟技术法规TR CU 004/2011（《低压设备安全》）管控，适用于额定50–1000 V交流的设备。适用于电冰箱的协调安全标准为GOST IEC 60335-2-24（《家用和类似用途电器——安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求》），须与通用标准GOST IEC 60335-1结合使用。哈萨克斯坦的220/380 V 50 Hz额定电网与中国220/380 V 50 Hz一致，因此无需进行额定电压或频率的重新设计。合格性通过EAC标志证明，由EAEU认可的认证机构以认证或符合性声明方式出具；合格文件随后录入EAEU统一注册系统。核心技术要求涵盖防触电保护、绝缘与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、接地连续性，以及俄语和哈萨克语的产品标识。
summary.zht: 投放哈薩克市場的家用製冷器具作為歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員國受EAEU框架管控。低壓設備的電氣安全由海關聯盟技術法規TR CU 004/2011（《低壓設備安全》）管控，適用於額定50–1000 V交流的設備。適用於電冰箱的協調安全標準為GOST IEC 60335-2-24（《家用和類似用途電器——安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求》），須與通用標準GOST IEC 60335-1結合使用。哈薩克的220/380 V 50 Hz額定電網與中國220/380 V 50 Hz一致，因此無需進行額定電壓或頻率的重新設計。合格性通過EAC標誌證明，由EAEU認可的認證機構以認證或符合性聲明方式出具；合格文件隨後錄入EAEU統一登記系統。核心技術要求涵蓋防觸電保護、絕緣與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、接地連續性，以及俄語和哈薩克語的產品標識。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union On the safety of low-voltage equipment (EAEU; EAC mark)

GOST IEC 60335-2-24 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (harmonised under TR CU 004/2011)
GOST IEC 60335-1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 （Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers）, technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations, read together with GB 4706.1-2005 （general requirements）. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. Because both the Chinese GB 4706.13 and the Kazakhstan GOST IEC 60335-2-24 trace to the same IEC 60335-2-24 base, the underlying engineering requirements are closely aligned, but the conformity documents and marks are issued under separate, mutually non-recognised regimes.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（《家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求》），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并包含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性标准，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于中国GB 4706.13和哈萨克斯坦GOST IEC 60335-2-24均溯源于同一IEC 60335-2-24基础，底层工程要求高度一致，但合格文件和标志由各自独立、互不承认的制度出具。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（《家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求》），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並包含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性標準，由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於中國GB 4706.13和哈薩克GOST IEC 60335-2-24均溯源於同一IEC 60335-2-24基礎，底層工程要求高度一致，但合格文件和標誌由各自獨立、互不承認的制度出具。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Although GB 4706.13 and GOST IEC 60335-2-24 share the same IEC 60335-2-24 base and the 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches (no voltage re-engineering), the conformity gap is procedural: (1) Chinese CCC test reports against GB 4706.13 are not accepted for EAC conformity — testing must be performed or reviewed by an EAEU-accredited laboratory against GOST IEC 60335-2-24; (2) the EAC certificate or declaration must be held by an applicant established in the EAEU (manufacturer-authorised local representative or importer) and registered in the unified EAEU register; (3) product markings, rating plate, and user instructions must be provided in Russian (and Kazakh where required); (4) national deviations in GB 4706.13 should be reviewed against GOST IEC 60335-2-24 to confirm no additional EAEU-specific test items are uncovered. IECEE CB Scheme reports (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) issued by an IECEE NCB may reduce re-testing scope at an EAEU body — verify with a qualified EAEU compliance consultant.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 4706.13与GOST IEC 60335-2-24共享同一IEC 60335-2-24基础，且220/380 V 50 Hz电网一致（无需电压重新设计），但合格性差距在于程序：（1）中国依据GB 4706.13的CCC检测报告不被EAC合格评定接受——检测须由EAEU认可的实验室依据GOST IEC 60335-2-24进行或评审；（2）EAC证书或声明须由在EAEU境内设立的申请人（制造商授权的当地代表或进口商）持有，并在EAEU统一注册系统登记；（3）产品标识、铭牌和使用说明须以俄语（必要时含哈萨克语）提供；（4）应将GB 4706.13中的国家偏差与GOST IEC 60335-2-24对照，确认无未覆盖的额外EAEU专项试验项目。由IECEE NCB出具的IECEE CB体系报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）可能在EAEU机构处缩减重新检测范围——请与合格的EAEU合规顾问核实。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 4706.13與GOST IEC 60335-2-24共享同一IEC 60335-2-24基礎，且220/380 V 50 Hz電網一致（無需電壓重新設計），但合格性差距在於程序：（1）中國依據GB 4706.13的CCC檢測報告不被EAC合格評定接受——檢測須由EAEU認可的實驗室依據GOST IEC 60335-2-24進行或評審；（2）EAC證書或聲明須由在EAEU境內設立的申請人（製造商授權的當地代表或進口商）持有，並在EAEU統一登記系統登記；（3）產品標識、銘牌和使用說明須以俄語（必要時含哈薩克語）提供；（4）應將GB 4706.13中的國家偏差與GOST IEC 60335-2-24對照，確認無未覆蓋的額外EAEU專項試驗項目。由IECEE NCB出具的IECEE CB體系報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）可能在EAEU機構處縮減重新檢測範圍——請與合格的EAEU合規顧問核實。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC conformity under TR CU 004/2011 required before placing household refrigerators on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market; GOST IEC 60335-2-24 is the applicable harmonised safety standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EAC conformity under TR CU 004/2011 is mandatory for household refrigerating appliances on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market. GOST IEC 60335-2-24 (with GOST IEC 60335-1) is the applicable safety standard. The 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, so no voltage re-engineering is needed, but Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 does not satisfy the EAC pathway — assessment to GOST IEC 60335-2-24 by an EAEU-accredited body, plus an EAEU-established applicant and register entry, are required. IECEE CB Scheme reports may reduce re-testing scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据TR CU 004/2011，家用制冷器具进入哈萨克斯坦／EAEU市场须强制取得EAC合格。GOST IEC 60335-2-24（配合GOST IEC 60335-1）为适用的安全标准。220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国一致，因此无需电压重新设计，但中国依据GB 4706.13的CCC认证不满足EAC路径——须由EAEU认可机构按GOST IEC 60335-2-24评定，并须有EAEU境内设立的申请人及注册登记。IECEE CB体系报告可能缩减重新检测范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據TR CU 004/2011，家用製冷器具進入哈薩克／EAEU市場須強制取得EAC合格。GOST IEC 60335-2-24（配合GOST IEC 60335-1）為適用的安全標準。220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國一致，因此無需電壓重新設計，但中國依據GB 4706.13的CCC認證不滿足EAC路徑——須由EAEU認可機構按GOST IEC 60335-2-24評定，並須有EAEU境內設立的申請人及登記。IECEE CB體系報告可能縮減重新檢測範圍。
